✦ Now Available

Build stunning pages

with speed

The headless CMS for teams that want both - visual page builder for creatives, Groovy hooks and REST APIs for engineers. Components, drafts, persistence. Everything you need to build fast.

Learn More on Github

About

Designed for modern teams

We built this CMS to close the gap between developers and content creators.


No more waiting for a developer to update a headline. No more fighting with rigid templates.


  • Visual editor — compose pages by dragging and dropping components
  • Live preview — see exactly how the page looks before publishing
  • Headless API — connect to any frontend: React, Vue, mobile apps
  • Extensible — add your own components with a custom JSX renderer and Groovy hooks
Component "PowerYourCMS" not supported yet
Component "BenefitsSection" not supported yet
Component "FeaturesShowcase" not supported yet
Component "UseCases" not supported yet
Component "DevelopmentStatus" not supported yet

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

What is a headless CMS?

A headless CMS manages and delivers content without being tied to a specific frontend. You build your pages visually, and the content is served via API to any frontend — React, Vue, mobile apps, and more.

Can I use my own components?

Yes! Drop a new component folder under packages/components/src/ and it auto-registers. The CMS detects it via import.meta.glob on the next hot-reload.

How does the live preview work?

The page builder renders your actual React components in real time. As you edit the JSON data in the modal, the preview updates instantly — no save required.

What about the Groovy hooks?

Each component can have lifecycle hooks written in Groovy: BEFORE_SAVE, AFTER_SAVE, BEFORE_FETCH, AFTER_FETCH, and ON_REQUEST. They run server-side on the JVM and let you transform data, validate, or call external APIs.

Can I use an alternative frontend instead of React?

Yes! Just call the Content APIs to get a JSON that you can render on your own!

Get started today
